text:
# April 17, 2026  
The week is flying by. Today was relatively calm at work. Finished the Spencer report ahead of schedule. My manager approved the new marketing strategy I proposed last week. Feels good when the hard work pays off.  
Preeti called in the afternoon. She wanted to discuss Neetish's tuition classes. The tuition center is increasing fees next month. We're considering whether to continue with the same center or look for alternatives. Neetish has been performing well there, so it's a tough decision.  
Mohan seemed better today. No more fever. He wanted to go to the park but Preeti made him rest. He's already asking for permission to go play with his friends tomorrow.  
Evening walk with Browny was refreshing. The weather in Indore is pleasant these days. Met some neighbors at the park. We discussed the upcoming community fair next month. The residents' welfare association is planning a mela.  
Preeti made biryani for dinner. The kids were excited. It's their favorite. Watched a movie together as a family before bed.
